items.prompt: In a typical RTL layout, generated objects and logs belong in…
items.explain: Keep generated artifacts in build/out and often exclude them from archives.

choices: Recursive content search with line numbers

items.prompt: sed 's/old/new/g' file prints a substituted stream by default and does not edit the file unless you use in-place flags.
items.explain: Test on stdout first; use -i only when ready.

choices: It produces unified diffs suitable for patches / similar to git diff
It only works on binary files
items.explain: Unified diff is the usual format for review and patch.
